competitors.name: Urban Company
competitors.notes: India's largest home services marketplace offering cleaning, appliance repair, beauty, wellness, and home maintenance services. Primary benchmark competitor for pricing, service portfolio, and customer experience.

competitors.name: Snabbit
competitors.notes: Fast-growing startup providing on-demand household help and cleaning services with a quick-response model. Valuable competitor for tracking innovation, customer acquisition, and service expansion.

competitors.name: Pronto
competitors.notes: On-demand house help platform with transparent flat pricing. Live in 11 cities (Bangalore, Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Pune, etc.). 20 services, 500K+ homes served. Major competitor to Urban Company and Snabbit.

competitors.name: KaamKaka
competitors.notes: India's largest home services platform. 1M+ happy customers, 4.8+ average rating. Services across Bangalore, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Delhi NCR. Full home cleaning, electrician, bathroom cleaning.

competitors.name: OyeKar
competitors.notes: Leading service marketplace for home and office services. AC repair, cleaning, plumbing, electrician, beauty services. Active in Noida, Delhi, Bangalore, Jaipur, and more cities.

competitors.name: HiCare
competitors.notes: Established pest control and home hygiene specialist. 34 services found. Strong brand presence with Playwright-rendered site. Good social data available.
